response.overview: In the ruthless world of corporate power, four ambitious individuals enter a dangerous game for control of one of the most influential companies in the world.  Sonia, a cunning and determined woman, joins forces with three men whose goals are as different as they are dangerous: Gabriel, a brilliant strategist haunted by his past; Oscar, a persuasive negotiator skilled in manipulation; and Sergio, a ruthless visionary willing to destroy anyone in his path.  As they move closer to taking control of the corporate empire, alliances begin to fracture and hidden agendas come to light. Trust becomes fragile, and every move carries consequences that could cost them everything.  What begins as a calculated battle of strategy soon turns into a fight for survival, where betrayal is inevitable and no one is who they seem to be.  In a world where power is everything, only one can rise — and the rest will fall.
response.title: El Juego Del Poder
